无论您是商务差旅、参展参会，还是出境旅游，
                中盛启瀚都将为您提供专业、高效的一站式交通与住宿预订服务。

desc.en: Choose the most convenient way to contact us

title.zh: 境外交通住宿预订 | 中盛启瀚 ZSTS

zh.text: 全球航线资源，最优价格保障
中文司机/导游，沟通无障碍

en.text: Global flight resources, best price guarantee

zh.q: 境外机票预订需要提前多久？
zh.a: 建议国际机票提前30-60天预订，可获得更优价格。旺季（寒暑假、春节、国庆）建议提前2-3个月。我们提供实时票价监控，帮您锁定最优价格。

zh.q: 机场接送服务覆盖哪些地区？
zh.a: 我们的机场接送服务覆盖全球主要城市和热门旅游目的地，包括东南亚、中东、欧洲、北美、日韩等。具体覆盖城市请咨询顾问。

zh.q: 境外包车可以配中文司机/导游吗？
zh.a: 可以。我们在东南亚、中东、欧洲等多地提供配中文司机/导游的包车服务。中文司机可协助沟通、推荐线路，让您的境外出行更轻松顺畅。

zh.q: 机票改签和退票怎么处理？
zh.a: 机票改签和退票政策因航司和票价类型而异。我们会在您预订前明确告知退改规则。如需变更行程，请联系顾问协助处理。

zh.q: 境外火车票/高铁票如何取票乘车？
zh.a: 欧洲高铁、日本新干线、东南亚火车等多支持电子票，预订成功后发送电子确认单/二维码，凭护照和电子票即可乘车，无需取纸质票。

zh.q: 如果遇到航班延误或取消怎么办？
zh.a: 如遇到航班延误或取消，请第一时间联系我们的24小时客服热线。我们将协助您与航司沟通，办理改签、退票或住宿安排等后续事宜。

zh.q: 境外酒店住宿可以代订哪些城市和品牌？
zh.a: 我们提供全球主要城市的酒店代订，覆盖经济型至高端国际品牌（万豪、希尔顿、洲际、雅高、华住等），并支持中东、东南亚、欧洲、日韩等热门目的地。

en.q: How far in advance should I book international flights?
en.a: We recommend booking 30-60 days in advance for better prices. For peak seasons, book 2-3 months ahead. We provide real-time fare monitoring.

en.q: Which regions are covered by airport transfer services?
en.a: Our airport transfer service covers major global cities and popular destinations, including Southeast Asia, Middle East, Europe, North America, Japan, and Korea.

en.q: Can I get a Chinese-speaking driver/guide for local car rental?
en.a: Yes. We provide local car rental with Chinese-speaking drivers/guides in Southeast Asia, Middle East, Europe, and more.

en.q: How are flight rebooking and refunds handled?
en.a: Rebooking and refund policies vary by airline and fare type. We will clearly inform you of the rules before booking.

en.q: How do I collect train tickets abroad?
en.a: Most high-speed trains in Europe, Japan, and Southeast Asia support e-tickets. After booking, you'll receive an e-confirmation — just travel with your passport and e-ticket.

en.q: What if my flight is delayed or cancelled?
en.a: Please contact our 24/7 customer service hotline immediately. We will assist you in communicating with the airline and handling rebooking, refunds, or accommodation.

en.q: Which cities and brands are covered for hotel booking?
en.a: We provide hotel booking in major cities worldwide, covering economy to premium brands (Marriott, Hilton, IHG, Accor, etc.) across the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Europe, Japan, and Korea.

subtitle.en: From flight booking to local travel and hotel stays, covering every leg of your overseas trip
subtitle.zh: 从机票预订到当地出行再到酒店住宿，覆盖您境外差旅的全链路需求
